title: Tick Control in Passaic, NJ | $125 – $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Passaic, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed exterminators. Same-day service available.
intro: Passaic residents face increasing tick populations due to the city's proximity to the Passaic River and numerous parks and green spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Passaic, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our affordable tick treatment plans range from $125 to $325, depending on property size and infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Passaic and surrounding communities with safe, EPA-approved tick treatments. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of tick control in Passaic's diverse neighborhoods, from historic homes near Dundee Park to multi-family residences along Main Avenue, delivering fast, effective results with same-day service options.
localContext: Passaic's abundant green spaces, including Third Ward Park and areas along the Passaic River, create ideal habitats for ticks that can easily spread to residential yards and common areas. Our tick control services protect properties throughout all Passaic neighborhoods, from the densely populated areas near Garfield Avenue to family homes in the Monroe Street district.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Passaic's parks, riverside areas, and tree-lined streets provide ideal environments for ticks carrying Lyme disease and other illnesses. Regular tick control protects your family, pets, and neighbors from these dangerous pests, especially during peak season from April through October.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Our Passaic tick control services range from $125 for smaller properties to $325 for larger yards or severe infestations. We provide free inspections and customized quotes based on your property size, vegetation density, and treatment needs.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick treatment in Passaic?
faqs.answer: We recommend tick treatments every 4-6 weeks during active tick season (April-October) for optimal protection. Properties near Passaic River, parks, or wooded areas may benefit from monthly treatments to maintain a tick-free environment.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We follow strict safety protocols and provide clear instructions on re-entry times, typically allowing your family to return within 2-4 hours after treatment.
